title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HCL Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HCL Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HCL Technologies has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About HCL Technologies:
HCL Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies!
